Command.Name: ELSandDLSCompatibility
Command.Title: How to make ELS & DLS Compatible with each other.
Command.Description:
Making ELS & DLS comaptible with each other is very straight forward. Please follow the steps below. 

 1. Locate the **DLS.ini** and find the "Extra Patch" value. 
 2. Set the "Extra Patch" value from **"true" to "false"** and click save. 

 ELS & DLS should now be able to work alongside each other. **If you still encounter issues**, please head to one of our many [support channels](https://discord.com/channels/788491012553179217/930551817790697492).
